chapter.label: Tale 125
chapter.title: The beautiful deed of abba sergios : mother of Abba Athenogenes, Bishop of Petra:

paragraphs.text: THE ANCHORITE There was a higoumen at Mount Sinai who was truly great, and an H ascetic; George by name. As he was sitting in his cell one Holy Some of the fathers of Sinai told us this about Abba Sergios the i Saturday, this Abba George conceived a desire to celebrate the holy anchorite: When he was living at Sinai, the steward put him in H resurrection in the Holy City and to partake of the holy mysteries charge of the mules. One day, as he went his way, there was a lion I in the Church of the Holy Resurrection of Christ our God. All day lying in his path, When the mules and the muleteer saw the lion, | long the elder continued in prayer meditating upon the validity of they were stricken with fear—and they took to their heels. Then these thoughts. With evening, his disciple came and said: ‘Father, Abba Sergios took a holy bread-ration <eulogia>* out of his pack give the word for us to proceed to the canonical service’. The elder and went up to the lion, saying to it: ‘Take the ration of the fathers replied: ‘You go, and when it is time for holy communion, return and get out of the way, so that we can pass by".
